climate.description: Typical southern Ontario summer: warm, humid days with lake moderation.
challenges: Precipitation: Low to moderate in August.

fondo_rating.scoring_notes: Migrated from gravel-race-automation. Original score: 69. adventure dimension dropped, road_surface added. Score recalculated: 66.

course_description.character: Scenic paved routes along Lake Huron shores, quiet country roads, rolling hills in Arkona, and picturesque orchards, with timed segments for competitive fun.
course_description.signature_challenge: Timed segments on rolling terrain allowing pacing between efforts, finishing with stunning Lake Huron views.
suffering_zones: Arkona Rolling Hills: Challenging climbs through rural hills that test legs mid-ride.
Lake Huron Finish: Exposed coastal push to the line with potential headwinds.

logistics.lodging_strategy: Hotels and lodging available in Sarnia; contact local tourism for options near Mike Weir Park.
logistics.transport: Fully supported event with fuel stations, bike support, hot meals, live music, and beer at Mike Weir Park start/finish.

history.origin_story: Celebrated gran fondo ranked Ontario's #1, supporting local palliative care with strong community backing.

final_verdict.one_liner: Ontario's top gran fondo: scenic, supported, and community-driven perfection.
